_comment: Blog posts. Body HTML lives in posts/<file>. Add an entry here + a posts/ file, then run: node generate.mjs. Newest first (sorted by date at build).

posts.title: What Is a Smart Home? A Plain-English Guide for Florida Homeowners
posts.metaTitle: What Is a Smart Home? A Simple Guide for Homeowners
posts.description: A clear, jargon-free guide to what a smart home is, how it works with Amazon Alexa, and where to start. Written for everyday homeowners.

posts.title: What Is Smart Home Automation and How Does It Work?
posts.description: Smart home automation made simple. Learn how routines, voice control, and Alexa work together to run your home hands free.

posts.title: The Best Smart Home Devices to Start With in 2026
posts.metaTitle: Best Smart Home Devices to Start With in 2026
posts.description: A beginner-friendly list of the smart home devices worth starting with, all built around Amazon Alexa and easy to use.

posts.title: Is Smart Home Automation Worth It? How It Changes Daily Life
posts.description: How smart home automation changes mornings, leaving home, evenings, and energy use, and how to decide if it is worth it for your South Florida home.

posts.title: What Does Smart Home Installation Cost in South Florida? (2026 Guide)
posts.description: A 2026 guide to what drives smart home installation cost in South Florida, typical starting ranges, and how to budget room by room.

posts.title: Smart Home Installation Near Me: How to Choose a Local Installer
posts.description: How to choose a local smart home installer in South Florida: licensing, insurance, references, the questions to ask, and the red flags to avoid.

posts.title: Smart Lighting Installation: A Room-by-Room Guide
posts.description: A room-by-room smart lighting installation guide: scenes, dimming, smart bulbs vs installed switches, and why pro installation wins for whole-home use.

posts.title: Smart Thermostats in Florida: Cut Your AC Bill Without the Guesswork
posts.description: How smart thermostat installation helps Florida homes manage cooling and humidity, plus scheduling, geofencing, multi-zone homes, and HVAC compatibility.

posts.title: Home Automation Services: What's Actually Worth Automating First
posts.description: New to home automation services? Here is what is actually worth automating first, the best payoff for the least cost, and how to avoid the five-app mess.

posts.title: Voice Control and Whole-Home Automation: A Beginner's Guide
posts.description: A beginner's guide to voice control and home automation: what voice does well, routines that run on their own, privacy basics, and one system instead of many apps.

posts.title: Free Smart Home Consultation: What to Expect (and How to Prep)
posts.description: What to expect from a free smart home consultation: how it works, how long it takes, what to prepare, and how the custom layout and honest quote work.
